title: Hourglass of Undying
description: Changes the totem of undying to a 3D hourglass model, and also changes the sound of use.
body:
## Now the totem of undying looks like an hourglass!
**Also changed the sound of using totem.**

**Requires OptiFine or CIT.**

---
**In game look**
